name: Better Than Sex Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake according to package instructions.
2. When done, allow it to slightly cool.
3. Poke holes in the top of the cake.
4. Pour over the milk and half of the caramel topping.
5. Let set for 1 hour.
6. Cover the cake with Cool Whip.
7. Sprinkle crushed candy bar on top.
8. Refrigerate.
